---
title: 'Dodge Dakota'
date: '2012-02-19T21:10:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6591803508668579197'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/dodge-dakota.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - '2nd Car'
  - 'Project'
---

<br />
Cars as so hard for me to be specific about, ultimately I'd like one type of car, but then I see another one I'd like. Money, Upkeep, Gas, Etc are a factor because even if I got a debt free BMW now, I'm not living at a level to keep up the insurance and maintence on a car like that, tires alone would give me a hard time at this moment. So then I look at others that are more NOW faith projects and leave certain cars as later faith projects.<br />
<br />
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2006-startech-chrysler-30-460x0w-a6e6d2c65d84.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2006-startech-chrysler-30-460x0w-54221a6bbe3d.jpg" width="320" /></a><br />
I thought I wanted a Chrysler 300M wagon/or the dodge version. I also like the Town and Country and generally I'm finding myself attracted to Dodge/Chrysler&nbsp;Products. Then the other day I see a four door Dodge Dakota, which as far as I can tell are no longer being made after 2010-2011. It's been growing on me.<br />
<br />
I should back up and say that I've been praying for God to reveal to me the things HE has planned for me, as opposed to just making things up and then asking Him to bless them. HE has plans to prosper me, Jer 29:11, and They are HIS plans, not mine. It's not about coming up with ways to make myself wealthy because HE wants me wealthy, it's just about believing and then following His plan, step by step. So I'm allowing Him to show me, what car, what clothes, what job/projects, etc...<br />
<br />
I think the Four Door Dakota is really growing on me. Either Dark Blue, Orange, Black, or a combination of all three! That's what I'm feeling drawn to.<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/03-dodge-dakota-4-door-reduced-10579-klamath-falls-or-9677332-blue-e77d2a6ceed1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="230" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/03-dodge-dakota-4-door-reduced-10579-klamath-falls-or-9677332-blue-648c14ae3c63.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2010-dodge-dakota-crew-cab-4-door-pickup-300x200-orange-509e28c0598b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/2010-dodge-dakota-crew-cab-4-door-pickup-300x200-orange-509e28c0598b.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blue-dodge-dakota-e3201e6303cd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blue-dodge-dakota-e3201e6303cd.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/dodge-dakota-black-387f5840a816.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/dodge-dakota-black-387f5840a816.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
